title: Amauropelta oviedoae
intro: Amauropelta oviedoae is a species of fern, specifically a type of tree fern, native to Panama. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, pain, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Amauropelta oviedoae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Amauropelta oviedoae is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory conditions.
